data.title: New Jersey American Water Encourages Customers to Save Water and Money During Fix a Leak Week
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Camden, New Jersey, it was announced that New Jersey American Water will participate in the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency's Fix a Leak Week. They will provide customers with guidance on identifying and repairing household leaks to prevent water wastage and safeguard homes. By implementing these measures, individuals can contribute to water conservation efforts and potentially lower their water bills.

data.title: Nuna Debuts REVV™ maxx
data.description: Vancouver, Washington - An innovative convertible car seat, the REVV™ maxx, by Nuna, a renowned brand in baby gear, is designed to rotate 360° and suitable for infants weighing up to 65 lbs. Launched on March 13, 2026, this upgraded version offers versatility and safety for newborns and toddlers.

data.title: Dollar General Rings Up A Q4 Beat, But 2026 Guidance Tempers The Buzz
data.description: Dollar General Corp (NYSE: DG) released its Q4 results recently. Analyst insights highlight Telsey Advisory Group's Joseph Feldman, who maintains a Market Perform rating, with a raised price target of $140. Meanwhile, Guggenheim Securities' John Heinbockel reiterated a Buy rating, lowering the price target from $165 to $160. BofA Securities' Robert Ohmes kept a Buy rating and a price target of $175. The earnings report showed adjusted earnings of $1.93 per share, surpassing the estimated $1.66 per share. A comp of 4.3% and an operating margin of 5.6% led to this beat, exceeding projected 3.5% and 5%, respectively. Also noted was a 2.6% increase in traffic and a 1.7% boost in average ticket, balancing higher average unit retails with lower units per transaction. For more details, refer to the full story not sourced here.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces Final Opportunity to Purchase Model Homes at The Evergreens at The Meadows in Lake Forest, California
data.description: Three beautifully designed model homes are currently on the market in a luxurious Southern California community. These professionally decorated homes offer a taste of resort-style living in the area. Interested buyers can explore these models and experience the essence of upscale living firsthand. With prices ranging from $500,000 to $700,000, these homes present an attractive opportunity for those seeking a blend of elegance and comfort in a sought-after location. Don't miss the chance to own a piece of this exclusive community.

data.title: Biophytis-LynxKite Alliance Expands to Turbocharge AI-driven drug discovery for next generation longevity therapeutics
data.description: Biophytis and LynxKite have joined forces to introduce advanced technologies that go beyond MASSIVE for AI-driven drug discovery aimed at developing next-generation longevity therapies. Through this collaboration, revenue will be generated via a computational longevity platform that incorporates unique curated datasets and accelerated computation methods. This partnership will revolutionize drug discovery by leveraging cutting-edge technologies to drive innovation in the field of longevity therapeutics.

data.description: ProText Mobility Inc. (OTC: TXTM) has provided an update to its shareholders regarding various strategic developments, liquidity status, and stock purchases. The company highlighted key information without disclosing any specific numbers.

data.title: Global Technology Leader Joins Connected Worker: Energy Summit as Gold Sponsor
data.description: In Houston on March 13, 2026, the 5th Annual Connected Worker: Energy Summit organizers revealed Microsoft as a Gold Sponsor for the upcoming event. This decision highlights Microsoft's dedication to driving digital transformation and empowering the workforce.

data.title: From Rio Straight to Europe: Brazilian airline announces direct flights between Rio de Janeiro to France and Portugal
data.description: Recently, GOL Linhas Aéreas, the leading punctual airline in Brazil, revealed plans to commence direct flights from Rio de Janeiro's RIOgaleão International Airport (GIG) to Paris-Charles de Gaulle Airport (CDG) in France, and Lisbon Airport (LIS) in Portugal. The new route aims to cater to the growing demand for travel between these destinations and enhance connectivity for passengers. This strategic move signifies the airline's commitment to expanding its international network.

data.title: Study: Legal AI survey indicates shift as Harvey, competing with Kira, gains ground in contract review. Market may consolidate. #SKILLS2026
data.description: According to the SKILLS 2026 survey, Harvey is making significant progress in contract review, narrowing the gap with specialized tools such as Kira. This trend suggests a possibility of consolidation within the legal AI market.
